description: Kneel and roll the wheel forward, extending your body, then pull back using your core.
name: Ab Wheel Rollout

description: Sit in the machine with pads on your outer thighs and press your legs apart.
name: Abductor Machine

description: Sit in the machine with pads on your inner thighs and squeeze your legs together.
name: Adductor Machine

description: Start with palms facing you at shoulder height, rotate outward as you press overhead.
name: Arnold Press

description: Stand on the platform, grip the handles and pull yourself up with the machine assisting.
name: Assisted Pull-up Machine

description: Bar on upper back, squat down until thighs are parallel, then drive back up.
name: Barbell Back Squat

description: Lie flat, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to chest and press up.
name: Barbell Bench Press

description: Stand over the bar, hinge at the hips, grip and drive through your feet to stand up.
name: Barbell Deadlift

description: Unrack the bar at shoulder height and press directly overhead to full lockout.
name: Barbell Overhead Press

description: Hinge forward, pull the bar to your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
name: Barbell Row

description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, squat down until thighs are parallel, then stand up.
name: Bodyweight Squats

description: Rear foot elevated on a bench, lower into a lunge, then drive up through the front leg.
name: Bulgarian Split Squat

description: Set cables high, step forward and press handles down and together in an arc.
name: Cable Crossover (High to Low)

description: Kneel facing a high cable, grip the rope and crunch down by flexing your abs.
name: Cable Crunch

description: Stand between cables set at chest height and bring handles together with a slight bend in your elbows.
name: Cable Flyes

description: Place the balls of your feet on the platform and raise your heels as high as possible.
name: Calf Raises

description: Sit in the machine, grip the handles and press forward until your arms are extended.
name: Chest Press Machine

description: Hang with an underhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Chin-ups

description: Lie flat, grip the bar with hands closer than shoulder-width apart, lower to chest and press up.
name: Close-Grip Bench Press

description: Pull the bar from the floor to your shoulders, then drive it overhead in one sequence.
name: Clean & Jerk

description: Pull the bar explosively from the floor to chin height using hip drive and a high elbow pull.
name: Clean High Pull

description: Hold a dumbbell at chest height with both hands and squat to depth with an upright torso.
name: DB Goblet Front Squat

description: Hold a dumbbell at chest height with both hands and squat down between your legs.
name: DB Goblet Squat

description: Swing a dumbbell from between your legs and pull it overhead in one smooth motion.
name: DB Muscle Snatch

description: Explosively pull a dumbbell from the floor and catch it at shoulder height.
name: DB Power Clean

description: Dip slightly at the knees, then drive the dumbbells overhead using leg and shoulder power.
name: DB Push Press

description: Hold dumbbells at your hips, hinge forward with a slight knee bend, then return to standing.
name: DB Romanian Deadlift

description: Explosively pull a dumbbell from the floor and catch it overhead with a locked arm.
name: DB Snatch

description: Hold dumbbells at your sides and lower into a split stance with a jerk-width foot position.
name: DB Split Squat (Jerk Stance)

description: Grip parallel bars, lower your body until your upper arms are parallel, then press up.
name: Dips

description: Lie flat with a dumbbell in each hand, lower to chest level, then press up.
name: Dumbbell Bench Press

description: Stand with dumbbells at your sides and curl them up by bending at the elbow.
name: Dumbbell Bicep Curls

description: Place one hand and knee on a bench, pull the dumbbell to your hip with the other arm.
name: Dumbbell Row

description: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder height and press directly overhead.
name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press

description: Pull a rope attachment towards your face, separating the ends and squeezing your rear delts.
name: Face Pulls

description: Lie on the floor with dumbbells, press up from the bottom position with elbows touching the ground.
name: Floor Press

description: Bar resting on the front of your shoulders, squat to depth keeping your torso upright.
name: Front Squat

description: Pull the bar from the floor and catch it overhead in a full squat position.
name: Full Snatch

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes.
name: Glute Bridge

description: Bar on your upper back, hinge forward at the hips keeping your legs nearly straight, then return.
name: Good Mornings

description: Position your feet on the platform, lower the sled by bending your knees, then press back up.
name: Hack Squat

description: Hold dumbbells with a neutral grip and curl them up, keeping your palms facing each other.
name: Hammer Curls

description: Start with the bar at hip height, explosively extend and catch it at your shoulders.
name: Hang Clean

description: Start with the bar at hip height, explosively extend and catch it overhead.
name: Hang Snatch

description: Hang from a bar and raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground or higher.
name: Hanging Leg Raise

description: Sit with your upper back against a bench, bar over your hips, and drive upward by squeezing your glutes.
name: Hip Thrust

description: Lie on an incline bench with dumbbells and press them up from chest level.
name: Incline DB Press

description: Hang beneath a bar set at waist height and pull your chest up to the bar.
name: Inverted Row

description: Hinge at the hips and swing the kettlebell to shoulder height using hip drive.
name: Kettlebell Swing

description: Sit and pull the bar down to your upper chest, squeezing your lats at the bottom.
name: Lat Pulldown

description: Stand and raise dumbbells out to your sides until your arms are parallel to the floor.
name: Lateral Raises

description: Lie face down or sit on the machine and curl your heels towards your glutes.
name: Leg Curl

description: Sit on the machine and extend your legs until they are straight, squeezing your quads at the top.
name: Leg Extensions

description: Sit in the machine, place your feet on the platform and press the sled away by extending your legs.
name: Leg Press

description: Set the cable low, grip with one hand and row towards your hip, squeezing your lat.
name: Low Row Cable (Single Arm)

description: Lie face down on the machine and curl your heels towards your glutes.
name: Lying Leg Curl Machine

description: Sit in the machine, grip the handles and press overhead to full extension.
name: Machine Shoulder Press

description: Pull the bar from the floor to your shoulders using a slow, controlled turnover without dropping under.
name: Muscle Clean

description: Hold the bar overhead with a wide grip and squat to full depth while keeping the bar stable.
name: Overhead Squat

description: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands and lower it behind your head, then extend back up.
name: Overhead Tricep Extension

description: Sit in the machine and bring the pads together in front of your chest, squeezing your pecs.
name: Pec Deck Machine

description: Start in a push-up position with hips raised high and press your head towards the floor.
name: Pike Push-ups

description: Hold a push-up position on your forearms, keeping your body in a straight line.
name: Plank

description: Pull the bar explosively from the floor and catch it at your shoulders without squatting below parallel.
name: Power Clean

description: Pull the bar explosively from the floor and catch it overhead without squatting below parallel.
name: Power Snatch

description: Rest your upper arms on the pad, curl the bar up by bending at the elbows.
name: Preacher Curls

description: Hang with an overhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Pull-ups

description: Dip slightly at the knees, then drive the bar overhead and catch with straight arms.
name: Push Jerk

description: Place your hands shoulder-width apart on the floor, lower your chest down, then push back up.
name: Push-ups

description: Bend forward with dumbbells and raise them out to the sides, squeezing your rear delts.
name: Reverse Flyes

description: Hold the bar at your hips, hinge forward with a slight knee bend, then return to standing.
name: Romanian Deadlift

description: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly and rotate a weight from side to side.
name: Russian Twists

description: Sit upright, pull the handle to your lower chest and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
name: Seated Cable Row

description: Sit on the machine with the pad behind your ankles and curl your heels towards your glutes.
name: Seated Leg Curl Machine

description: Lie on your side propped on your forearm, keeping your body in a straight line.
name: Side Plank

description: Set the cable at mid-height, grip with one hand and row towards your hip.
name: Single Arm Cable Row

description: Hold a dumbbell overhead with one arm and squat to depth while keeping the weight stable.
name: Single Arm DB Overhead Squat

description: Grip the handle with one hand and pull down towards your side, squeezing your lat.
name: Single Arm Lat Pulldown

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and curl your torso up off the floor.
name: Sit-ups

description: Lie flat, hold the bar above your chest and lower it towards your forehead, then extend back up.
name: Skull Crushers

description: Press the bar overhead from your shoulders and drop under it into a full overhead squat.
name: Snatch Balance

description: Pull the bar explosively from the floor to chin height with a wide grip and high elbows.
name: Snatch High Pull

description: Drive the bar overhead from your shoulders and split your feet into a lunge to catch it.
name: Split Jerk

description: Stand facing a high cable, pull the bar down with straight arms until your hands reach your thighs.
name: Straight Arm Pulldown

description: Straddle the T-bar, hinge forward and pull the handle towards your chest.
name: T-Bar Row

description: Face the cable machine, grip the attachment and push down by extending your elbows.
name: Tricep Pushdowns

description: Step forward into a lunge, alternating legs with each step while holding dumbbells.
name: Walking Lunges
